title: RGS10 differently modulates NFKB subunit transcription and inflammatory cytokine profiles in peritoneal macrophages.
author: Jernigan, Janna
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Data collected here represent the RNA yeild, MSD cytokine quantification, and QPCR analysis of RGS10 KO and WT(B6) peritoneal macrophages that were stimulated with 100ng/ml LPS for 1,2,4,8,or 24h.
steps_raw: Data collected here represent the RNA yeild, MSD cytokine quantification, and QPCR analysis of RGS10 KO and WT(B6) peritoneal macrophages that were stimulated with 100ng/ml LPS for 1,2,4,8,or 24h.
